name: Saint's Rest Waystation

sensory_description.sight: Lantern-lit rafters sagging over wet cloaks, prayer ribbons, and muddy cart tracks.
sensory_description.sound: Stable chains clinking behind thin walls and muted arguments over ale.
sensory_description.smell: Old smoke, wet leather, and onion broth.

notable_features: Guild ledgers pass through the back office.
A locked prayer niche doubles as a document cache.
hidden_elements: Burned paper ash from destroyed route manifests.
A cellar latch marked with the Root-Glass sigil.
plot_beats: Win or survive the attention of the Sun Choir
